channel.title: Math - 标签 - 起源大陆

item.title: 数学题
item.description:
第一题

求 \lim_{x \to \infty} \frac{[(1+\frac{1}{x})^x]^x}{e^x} 的极限
> 解: 原式 = \lim_{x \to \infty} \left[(1+\frac{1}{x})^x \right]^x \cdot e^{-x} > >∵x→∞,(1+1x)x→e> > \because x \to \infty, (1 + \frac{1}{x})^x \to e > >∵x→∞,(1+x1​)x→e>>∴x→∞,[(1+1x)x]x→ex> > \therefore x \to \infty, \left[(1+\frac{1}{x})^x \right]^x \to e^x > >∴x→∞,[(1+x1​)x]x→ex> > \therefore 原式 = \lim_{x \to \infty} \left[(1+\frac{1}{x})^x\right]^x \cdot e^{-x} = \lim_{x \to \infty} e^x \cdot e^{-x} > >∵ex⋅e−x=ex−x=e0=1> > \because e^x \cdot e^{-x} = e^{x-x} = e^0 = 1 > >∵ex⋅e−x=ex−x=e0=1> > \therefore 当x \to \infty时, 原式 = \lim_{x \to \infty} \frac{[(1+\frac{1}{x})^x]^x}{e^x} = 1 >

第二题

求 \int_{0}^{1} \frac{\ln(1+x)}{1+x^2}\mathrm{d}x 的积分
> 令 x = \tan t 得 {d}x = \sec ^2t{d}t > >∵I=∫0π4ln⁡(1+tan⁡t)dt> > \because I = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \ln(1+\tan t) {d}t > >∵I=∫04π​​ln(1+tant)dt>>=∫0π4ln⁡(1+tan⁡(π4−u))du> > = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \ln(1+\tan (\frac{\pi}{4} - u)) {d}u > >=∫04π​​ln(1+tan(4π​−u))du>>=∫0π4ln⁡(1+1−tan⁡u1+tan⁡u)du> > = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \ln(1 + \frac{1 - \tan u}{1 + \tan u}) {d}u > >=∫04π​​ln(1+1+tanu1−tanu​)du>>=∫0π4ln⁡(21+tan⁡u)du> > = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \ln(\frac{2}{1 + \tan u}) {d}u > >=∫04π​​ln(1+tanu2​)du>>=∫0π4ln⁡2du−∫0π4ln⁡(1+tan⁡u)du> > = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \ln 2 {d}u - \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \ln (1 + \tan u) {d}u > >=∫04π​​ln2du−∫04π​​ln(1+tanu)du>>∴2I=∫0π4ln⁡2du> > \therefore 2I = \int_{0}^{\frac{\pi}{4}} \ln 2 {d}u > >∴2I=∫04π​​ln2du>>∴I=π8ln⁡2> > \therefore I = \frac{\pi}{8} \ln 2 > >∴I=8π​ln2>
